name: Fruited Rice w/ Mushrooms & Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add rice and stir. Reduce heat to medium.
3. Add the fruits and salt. Cook for 15 minutes on medium heat.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients and cover the pot.
5. Continue cooking until all liquid is absorbed, stirring as needed.
